title: 1Password vs Okta
description: Compare 1Password vs Okta in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right security & compliance tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, 1Password emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.6/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, 1Password or Okta?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, 1Password edges ahead with a 4.6/5 rating. 1Password excels at 1Password is a password manager and identity security platform that helps organi, while Okta is stronger for Enterprise identity and access management platform..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between 1Password and Okta?
faqs.answer: 1Password and Okta differ in pricing ($7.99/mo per user vs $2-15/user/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is 1Password cheaper than Okta?
faqs.answer: 1Password starts at $7.99/mo per user while Okta starts at $2-15/user/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, 1Password or Okta?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for security & compliance. 1Password scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use 1Password and Okta together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, 1Password or Okta?
faqs.answer: Both 1Password and Okta prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which security & compliance tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Okta for large teams, while 1Password may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $7.99/mo per user pricing.
